Grey Gold Induction 10 Pc Cookware Set Non Stick Frying Pan Saucepan Cooking Pot

Item Description

Gr8 Home Grey Gold 10 Piece Induction Non Stick Aluminium Kitchen Cookware Set Casserole Cooking Pot Frying Pan Saucepan With Glass Lids

Key Product Features

Lid: Glass lids

Base: Induction Steel Disc Base

Interior: Grey Ceramic Non Stick Coating

PFAS, PTFE, PFOA FREE

Exterior: Grey Heat Resistant Painting

Parts: Gold Stainless Steel Oven Safe Handle/ Knob

Material: Pressed Aluminium

Durable Aluminium Body

Item Sizes:

26*4.5 cm Fry Pan

30*5 cm Fry Pan

18*8 cm Saucepan with lid

20*8.6 cm Saucepan with lid

24*6.5 cm Saucepan with lid

24*11 cm Casserole with lid

Suitable for: Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen, Induction

Product Description

Upgrade your kitchen with this premium 10-piece cookware set, designed for everyday cooking with professional-level performance. Crafted for durability and style, this versatile collection includes all the essential pots and pans to prepare anything from quick weeknight meals to gourmet dishes.

Product Details

Product Code: EHRW-S003

Sku No: 2017202

Ean: 5057102017202

Package Dimensions: 55 x 35 x 18cm Approx

Product Weight Inc Packaging: 5.7kg Approx

Please Note: Colour May Slightly Vary From The Image Shown Although The Concept Is The Same

We are a family run business with over 30 years experience in the trade. We began selling on eBay at the end of 2008 and have built an excellent portfolio of products we are always adding new lines and sourcing great deals, we can offer incredible prices due to our excellent trading partners locally and abroad. With our experience we ensure all our products are of the best quality and genuine merchandise.

PayPal is the only method of payment accepted from all buyers, you do not need a PayPal account to pay via PayPal you can use any debit or credit card and pay direct into PayPal. Sorry no other payment form is accepted

We will ship your goods within 24 hours of receiving cleared payment monday-Friday, Purchases made on Friday thru to Sunday will be sent on Monday. We print invoices from 8am (7am from October-December) so purchases after that time will be sent 24 hours later. We use Royal Mail, The DX secure, Fed Ex, UPS, UK Mail, DPD. We will only ship to the address on the invoice unfortunatly we cannot ship to any other address. For International shipments, we use UPS, Fed Ex, DPD, if your country is not listed please ask us for a quote some countries we cannot ship to, we require a valid phone number for all international orders

After choosing Buy it Now, please pay for pay for your item with 3 days, or ebay will open a unpaid item case. We have our eBay account set up so eBay opens cases on our behalf and this will be done after 3 days. We will offer shipping discount on multiple purchases, some items already offer a discount on postage please see postage and payments tab on the listing page for rates. Please see our returns policy at the bottom of the page for any issues about returning a product. Please leave me positive feedback when you are 100% satisfied with your purchase and our service, if for any reason you feel negative feedback is necessary please contact us so we can resolve the issue before leaving negative feedback.

We will accept returns on all our products that are faulty, please initially send us a message through eBay. Then we will ask you to send the item back. So we can check it and then we will send you a brand new one absolutely free refund your postage through PayPal. PLEASE PUT EBAY USER ID IN PACKAGE ALONG WITH A NOTE. FOR UNWANTED GOODS, ITEMS MUST BE RETURNED IN RESELLABLE CONDITION AT THE BUYERS COST WE WILL THEN ONLY REFUND ITEM COST NOT POSTAGE PAID.

sticking.   Also, you'll be able to cook healthier meals for your family since you won't have to use as much oil.   You can safely cook tomato sauce in granite cookware cookware, the taste and smell product.product_name: 100W Solar Panel Set Kit Trickle Battery Charger 12V For Car Van Caravan Boat UK
product.description:
Description:

1. Wide Use: It has a single crystal r chip, lightweight and portable, suitable for outdoor travels. Can charge automobiles, boats, motorcycles, electric fans, emergency lights, solar water pumps, RV batteries or any 12V lead acid battery.

2. Dual USB Output Ports: The back junction box has dual USB ports that can charge two USB devices fast at the same time. The solar panel can charge your phone in emergency.

3. High Charge Efficiency: The solar panel with high conversion rate of 24% charges fast in the direct strong sunlight.

4. Stable and Durable: Scratch resistant, non-foaming and easy to clean. Using advanced polyethylene coating technology, its surface is plated with dark blue reflective film, which is uniform and beautiful in color.

5. Adjustable Angle: With a semi-flexible design, the solar panel can bent appropriately to suit a wider range of applications.

 

WHY DO WE NEED A SOLAR TRICKLE CHARGER?

Automotive batteries naturally discharge when it's not in use, and those more than 30 electrical modules as computer, alarm system, immobilizer and lock monitoring, all consume electricity from the battery. These issues make it hard to boot. Solar trickle charger solve the startup problem by keeping the battery active.


Feature:

This product adopts a new conversion method to double the working current of solar output with the same area and power.

[ Prolong the battery longevity ]

A 12V battery that is not correctly maintained above 12.4V will suffer from sulphation, which the main cause of battery died. That's why the vehicle battery easily goes to dead when vehicles are left sitting for too long. Solar trickle charger prolong the longevity with continuous trickle charging to the battery.

[ Multiple protection, portable, reliable charger ]

With overcharge&reversal drain protection modules, convenient to use the solar trickle charger with various vehicle, RV, Camper, Tractor, Motoecycles,Snowmobiles,Boat, etc.

[Top up your vehicle easily]

Automotive batteries naturally discharge when it's not in use, and those more than 30 electrical modules as computer, alarm system, immobilizer and lock monitoring, all consume electricity from the battery. These issues make it hard to boot. Solar trickle charger solve the startup problem by keeping the battery active.


Specifications:

Material: PET+Poly silicon cell

Waterproof rating: IP65

Solar energy conversion rate: 20%

Vpmax: 12v

NOCT(nominal operating cell temperature): 40-85°C

USB Output Voltage:

Output: 12V

Self-consume: <10mA

Operationg temperature: -35-60℃

Color: Black

 

1. Put the solar panel battery facing the sun, andthe LED indicator of the output box turns red. Thenthe solar panel starts to work.

2. This product is not recommended to charge themobile phone directly. It should be used together withthe charging bank, which can be used to charge the mobilehone, tablet computer and other electronic products

 

Note: If the product is equipped with a controller, it mustbe connected to the battery to work. Otherwise, thecontrol is not displayed and does not workwarm tins.

 

Model: PWM

Self-consume: <10mA

Voltage: DC 12V

Max solar input: <30V

Rated working current: ≤20A

Discharge reconnect: 10.2V

Working temperature: -35℃~60℃

 

Package:

1 x Solar Panel with Accessories(4 suction cups, 1 cigarette lighter, 1 double end tiger clip, 1 USB Busbar)
product.category: Tools & DIY > Power & Electrical Supplies > Solar & Wind Energy > Solar Battery Chargers, Maintainers & Kits

product.product_name: 12 X 500 ML Dehumidifier Disposable Damp Moisture Mould Mildew Remover Trap
product.description:
• PURPOSE OF USAGE - Freshens room air by eliminating musty odor caused by excess moisture. Protects clothes and items from excess moisture damage.
  • IDEAL FOR ANYWHERE - Use it on any flat surface where you need to dehumidify or remove odor such as the closet, bathroom, bedroom, kitchen, storage, laundry room, garage, basement, recreational vehicle (RV), etc.
  • EASY TO USE - Remove the plastic lid and peel back foil wrapper. Put the lid back on and place where needed. DO NOT remove the white safety barrier sheet. It is recommended to be replaced every 3 - 4 months, depending on the usage environment.
  • SAFETY CAUTION - Please place on a flat surface and keep it upright at all times. Keep away from children's reach.
  • QUICK & EFFECTIVE - Refined Calcium Chloride is a bead-type ingredient that allows quick dehumidification process with its large surface area. Beads start absorbing moisture from the air when silver lining is peeled off.

The consumer unit provides overload and short-circuit protection. The maximum bearing current of the consumer box is 40A, 16A, and 6A respectively. The back of the electric box comes with mounting holes, so it does not need to punch extra holes. The consumer unit is equipped with screws and waterproof plugs, so it is easy to install.

The electric box is made of FR-ABS and PC material to reduce the hidden danger. The consumer unit adopts a closed structure, so it has various protective functions such as rain, water, sand, dust, and so on.

The consumer unit is widely used in garages, caravans, workshops, outbuildings, steel manufacturing, food industries, electric power, railways, etc.

Using 2.4A + QC3.0 USB ports, you can quickly charge 2 devices at the same time. Two cigarette lighter sockets can provide up to 120W total power, which is very suitable for your GPS, dashcam, Kindle, FM.

With the unique outer ring ambient light, this design allows you to worry-free operation in the dark environment, but also allows your car to be full of colors at night.

The multifunctional design saves you from stinging lines and makes your car tidier. Two embedded blue LED lights to allow you to easily find the socket in the dark.

product.product_name: Fish Tank Rock Natural Aquarium Stone Decoration Malawi Cichlid MIXED 25kg Set
product.description:
ABOUT USLISTINGSFEEDBACKCONTACTADD TO FAVORITES
Please visit our our other auctions to see our great deals and offers! When buying more than one item we often offer a discount! Do not miss out on our amazing deals! 
substrateslimestoneswoodsaquascapingslatespebbleslava rocksall decorations 3d backgroundsshellsIwagumi setsMalawi setscoralscaves & ornaments tests & treatmentsfilter media fish foodcleaning & acessoriesheatingfiltersair equiqmentfish tank & cabinetsprotect basesall offer




MIXED SET OF STONES
(25 KG SET)
It may constitute a basic building block for aquariums with stone and rocky decor, creating beautiful backgrounds, hiding spots, substrates. Limestone is usually used to decorate Tanganyika and Malawi biotope aquariums with cichlids. You can create beautiful rock compositions that often resemble a reef and a marine aquarium, hence limestone is so popular.
SET INCLUDES: White & red imestones,green angel rocks, barnacle shells(5 pieces) -stabilises pH and hardens the water -perfect for rock biotopes: Tanganyika, Malwai, Lake Victoria -verydecorative, hollownaturally -a large number of crannies is a hideout for the juvenile fish
100% NATURAL. Every owner of underwater pets knows that decorations and aquarium substrates not only look nice, but also affect the environment of our fish. That is why it should be ensured that most of them are natural. A great material for building caves, hiding places that are a kind of shelter for fish. They are very scared animals, so it is good to provide them with a place that they can easily enter and hide in when they feel threatened.
ADDITIONAL advantage when using the decorations from our offer is the fact that the stone, due to its internal structure, contributes to the filtration of water, which enables the maintenance of a high level of its purity in the long term.
It is the suggested amount for an aquarium arround 90-120cm / 3-4ft in length.
CHOOSING our offer, you will receive a perfectly composed set of stones of different sizes.You can rely on our many years of experience. We select carefully selected pieces only.
If you have any individual wishes, please inform us about it in the message sent after the purchase:
quantity of rocks to be included in the number of kilograms bought (the more pcs., the smaller stones)
*general shape of rocks
*size of rocks in cm
*style (decoration) of the aquarium
We will try to select the rocks that best suit the description of the buyer.
Due to the large number of buyers, we are physically not able to send photos,
so the selection of individual rocks is performed on the basis of the buyer's description.
Please visit our our other auctions to see our great deals and offers! When buying more than one item we often offer a discount!
Why TM Aquatix?
uk seller
Standard delivery takes up to 2-3 working days after payment has cleared. If your order does not arrive on time please contact us through ebay and we will track the order for you. In order to receive a free text with your delivery day & time please provide us with your mobile number. Please include it in a paypal note when you will be paying or simply send it to us via ebay message.

our ratings
We always try our best to ensure ALL of our customers are 100% satisfied, earning us a prestigious 5 star rate eBay shop! We work hard every day to earn over positive reviews with 99% customers being happy with their purchase! Your satisfaction is very important to us.Please contact us before leaving Neutral or Negative feedback as we can always sort out issues to your full satisfaction.
about us
Established in 2014, we are a family run business that specialises in providing aquarium supplies. All of our products are naturally sourced and we pride ourselves on providing excellent customer service to our clients. We are a wholesale retailer, our clients range from individual customers to businesses.

product.product_name: Aquarium Slate Fish Tank Rock Decoration Stone Natural BLACK SLATE 3kg Set
product.description:
ABOUT USLISTINGSFEEDBACKCONTACTADD TO FAVORITES
Please visit our our other auctions to see our great deals and offers! When buying more than one item we often offer a discount! Do not miss out on our amazing deals! 
substrateslimestoneswoodsaquascapingslatespebbleslava rocksall decorations 3d backgroundsshellsIwagumi setsMalawi setscoralscaves & ornaments tests & treatmentsfilter media fish foodcleaning & acessoriesheatingfiltersair equiqmentfish tank & cabinetsprotect basesall offer



Recommend amount for different aquarium lengths:
 1 kg = 5-10 pieces 5-10cm
 2 kg = 5-10 pieces 5-15cm
 3 - 5kg = 30cm / 1ft in length
 8 - 10kg = 60cm / 2ft in length
 10 - 15kg = 80cm / 2,5ft in length
 15 - 20kg = 90cm / 3ft in length
 20 - 25kg = 120cm / 4ft in length
 40 - 50kg = 150cm / 5ft in length
 50 - 80kg = 180cm / 6ft in length






Black Slate 3kg Set. Graphite and black with gloss, ready-made, thin tiles to be laid in an aquarium or terrarium; it has smooth surface, darkens considerably in contact with water. The slate is perfect for creating caves, lining the back wall of the aquarium. It doesn't take up much space. 
It is completely natural and does not affect the pH of water, nor its cloudiness. It is suitable for all types of aquariums. In contact with water, they shimmer and shine in different shades of black/grey. Perfect match for plants and other decorative stones,  like roots that are also available in our wide offer.
 A great material for building caves / hiding places that are a kind of shelter for fish. They are very scared animals, so it is good to provide them with a place that they can easily enter and hide in when they feel threatened.

100% NATURAL. Every owner of underwater pets knows that decorations and aquarium substrates not only look nice, but also affect the environment of our fish. That is why it should be ensured that most of them are natural. Usually used to decorate Tanganyika and Malawi biotope aquariums with cichlids. -stabilises pH and hardens the water -perfect for rock biotopes: Tanganyika, Malwai, Lake Victoria -verydecorative

A great material for building caves, hiding places that are a kind of shelter for fish. They are very scared animals, so it is good to provide them with a place that they can easily enter and hide in when they feel threatened. It is a perfect match for plants and other decorative stones, roots that are also available in our wide offer.

Selected aquarium rock of high, repeatable quality in shades of grey with few light tarnishes. It is characteristic and constitutes a beautiful decoration of each tank. The dark colour combined with the irregular shape of the rock contrasts perfectly with the green colour of plants in plant aquariums and with the light ground in the rock aquariums. It becomes even prettier when placed in water because in combination with aquarium lighting it gets a subtle glow.

Located in the central part of the aquarium and accompanied by the flora, it perfectly imitates a rocky hill. They also look good on light ground in a tank of Tanganyika (Malawi) type. Irregular edges resemble mountain peaks.

An additional advantage when using the decorations from our offer is the fact that the stone, due to its internal structure, contributes to the filtration of water, which enables the maintenance of a high level of its purity in the long term.

35cm Towel Holder Rail (White)

Wash cloth, bath towel, brush, bath ball, etc. Easy installation of the towel rail. Stick the 35 cm towel holder in the desired place (must be a smooth surface, such as ceramic tiles, metal surfaces, glasses, etc.).
  • Easy and safe installation: the towel holder can be glued to the wall, it can be easily installed with a long and strong adhesive strip, no mounting material and no drilling required. Install the towel rail in just a few minutes.

The self-adhesive towel holder can be your organiser for the bathroom, kitchen, living room, bedroom etc.
  • Easy to hang towels: Every bathroom needs a solution for hanging towels. The towel holder helps to keep towels in place without rolling down, spreads towels for quick drying, the distance between the wall and the towel rail is 45 mm.
  • Quality and solid construction: High-quality stainless steel for durability and durability, shiny, highly reflective, polished chrome finish is rust-proof, corrosion-resistant, no peeling.



Every bathroom needs a towel hanging solution, and when it comes to having your bath towels dry completely after showering and bathing, a towel bar is often the ideal option.

While hooks take up less space, the best towel rails allow you to spread out towels so they dry before bacteria and mold can grow, while bringing some order to your bathroom.

The smell of mouldy towels does not contribute to a relaxing, spa-like bathroom atmosphere.

This modern and stylish Self Adhesive Towel Bar in stainless steal will be a fashionable detail in your kitchen.

The self-adhesive holder is made of high quality stainless steel, which is a durable and durable material that is corrosion and rust resistant. The towel holder has a smooth, shiny surface that makes it easy to maintain and clean.

The self-adhesive towel rail is longer than 210 mm and width in 45 mm. Which lasts longer than other towel rails on the market.

Easy to install

Simply clean the surface where you want to place it, peel off the tape and press it for 5 - 10 seconds. Let it hang for 24 hours before actually using it!

  • Longer Spray Time and Distance: With a spray time of up to 40 seconds, which is 5 times longer than traditional fire extinguishers, and a spraying distance of 13 ft (4 m), this extinguisher can reliably put out fires from a safe distance 
  • Simple and Rapid Fire Control: Open the bottle cap and press the nozzle to put out the fire; the extinguisher quickly takes effect in a fire’s early stages, helping users quickly control its source before it spreads 
  • Tackle 5 Types of Fires: This extinguisher is designed to tackle various types of fires with ease, including petrol and diesel, electrical equipment, wood, paper, and fabrics; by effectively isolating the combustible material from the air, this extinguisher prevents the fire from re-igniting and ensures that the fire is quickly put out 
  • Handy Extinguisher: With its compact height of 10.4 inches (26.5 cm) and weight of only 25 ounces (700 g), this compact extinguisher is easy to grip, carry and use; it can be easily placed in cabinets, vehicles, toolboxes, garages, kitchens, bedrooms, camping sites, and anywhere with a potential fire hazard to be ready for immediate use at any time 
  • Safe and Easy to Clean: Thanks to its gentle formula, this extinguisher will not damage electrical appliances, cabinets, or equipment surfaces; after use, simply wipe to clean 
  • No Extra Maintenance: This extinguisher doesn’t need regular inspection and maintenance; it is ready to use upon purchase, saving you the extra expenses and hassle of installation.

Reverse Osmosis RO Unit Filter Kit Set Including Sediment Carbon Block and GAC
Item Description

You are purchasing a replacement set of RO Unit filter cartridges, suitable for all RO Units. This kit contains 1 x sediment filter, 1 x carbon block filter, and 1 x Granular activated carbon (GAC) filter.

These filter cartridges fit a standard 10" RO Unit canister housing, and should be replaced every 6 months in order to keep your RO unit working at its best.

About Us

Finest Filters is part of the Finest Aquatics group of companies. We specialise in high quality aquarium and pond filtration media and equipment. We also provide many other none aquatic related products, including commercial water filters and replacement filter cartridges for refrigerator and under sink filter kits. All of our products are manufactured to the highest standards, under strict quality control measures and all of our products listed are in stock in our UK based warehouse, ready for same day dispatch.

Payment

Our preferred payment method is PayPal. PayPal is the most secure method of payment. We are however pleased to also accept payment via postal order or by cheque. Please make cheques and postal orders payable to ?Finest Aquatics LTD?. Please contact us after placing your order if you wish to pay via postal order or cheque.

Shipping

All of our items are in stock in our UK based warehouse for immediate dispatch. Orders placed before 2pm are shipped on the same day. Please note, we do not dispatch items on Saturdays. We offer free 2nd class postage by Royal Mail on all items available for sale in our eBay shop. Our free post option usual takes around 2-3 days to arrive with Royal Mail. We also offer a 1st class postage option, which is usually a next day service if your order is placed before 2pm. If a next day guaranteed service is required, Royal Mail Special Delivery can also be selected at the checkout, and this will ensure the item arrives the next day before 1pm. If required, these postage upgrades can be selected at the checkout stage if required.

Terms

Please make payment within 7 days of purchasing an item. If you intent to pay for an item after this time, please contact us.

Returns

We hope you will be extremely pleased with your purchase from us, however, if you are unsatisfied or change your mind about a purchase, we have a 'no questions asked' returns policy. All customers are entitled to a refund of the item amount paid minus actual postage costs. We do, however require all products to be returned to us within 30 working days, at the customers cost. Please ensure an appropriate level of compensation insures the item whilst in transit, as we can't accept liability for losses of returns in the post. Once we receive the item back in its original condition, We will then refund the item amount minus our postage cost paid. We advise customers to intiate a returns request through the eBay returns centre, so that a packing slip and shipping label can be generated for your order. For change of mind returns, we ask that items are returned in their original condition and packaging to allow them to be resold.
